checks.description: After eight consecutive cycles where din_valid is asserted, dout_valid must assert for one cycle and dout_parallel must equal the 8‑bit value formed by the serial bits presented on din_serial (MSB first).
checks.pass_condition: When a sequence of eight valid serial bits is observed, exactly one dout_valid pulse occurs and the parallel output matches the captured byte in the documented bit order.
checks.trigger_condition: When the stimulus drives a legal eight‑bit serial transfer (din_valid high for eight cycles).

checks.description: Each group of eight valid serial bits must generate its own distinct dout_valid pulse; pulses must not be merged across back‑to‑back groups.
checks.pass_condition: The number of dout_valid pulses observed equals the number of completed 8‑bit groups driven by the stimulus.
checks.trigger_condition: When two or more eight‑bit serial groups are applied back‑to‑back.

checks.description: During reset assertion and release, dout_parallel and dout_valid must remain stable (no toggling) until reset is deasserted.
checks.pass_condition: No change on the observed signals while rst_n is low; after release, signals may change only under normal operation.
checks.trigger_condition: While reset is asserted or during its release.
